description_long: This is a compact, ornate wooden cabinet with a dark, polished top surface and two drawers, one of which is partially open. The cabinet features distinctive, curved black side supports that give it a decorative and sturdy appearance. On top of the cabinet, there are two rolled parchment scrolls tied with red bands, and additional scrolls are visible inside the open drawer. The front of the cabinet is equipped with metallic handles, enhancing its functionality and visual appeal. The back of the cabinet is plain, lacking any openings or handles, while the sides reveal the thickness and construction of the wood and metal elements. The overall design suggests a blend of utility and style, suitable for urban interiors such as offices, libraries, or study rooms.
description: A small, decorative wooden cabinet with curved black supports, two drawers, and several parchment scrolls on and inside it. The cabinet features metallic handles and a polished dark top.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers (one open), metallic handles, and scrolls on top and inside the open drawer.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved black supports and the thickness of the cabinet's structure, with scrolls visible on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wooden back with no handles or openings, and scrolls resting on the top surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the curved supports and the side profile of the drawers and scrolls on top.
